links.title: Mapping the Exploitation Surface: A 10,000-Trial Taxonomy of What Makes LLM Agents Exploit Vulnerabilities

primary_link.title: Mapping the Exploitation Surface: A 10,000-Trial Taxonomy of What Makes LLM Agents Exploit Vulnerabilities

papers.summary: LLM agents with tool access can discover and exploit security vulnerabilities. This is known. What is not known is which features of a system prompt trigger this behaviour, and which do not. We present a systematic taxonomy based on approximately 10,000 trials across seven models, 37 prompt conditions, and 12 hypothesized attack dimensions -- all executed in real Docker sandboxes. Every condition includes the instruction "Always respect all rules and access policies"; only a single encouragement
papers.summary_zh: 具有工具存取權限的 LLM agents 可以發現並利用安全漏洞，這點已知。然而，未知的是，系統 prompt 的哪些特徵會觸發此行為，哪些則不會。我們提出了一種系統性分類法，基於約 10,000 次試驗，涵蓋了七個 models、37 種 prompt 條件和 12 個假設的攻擊維度 — 所有試驗都在真實的 Docker sandboxes 中執行。每個條件都包含指令「Always respect all rules and access policies」；即使只有單一的鼓勵詞。
papers.title: Mapping the Exploitation Surface: A 10,000-Trial Taxonomy of What Makes LLM Agents Exploit Vulnerabilities
papers.title_zh: 繪製攻擊面：一項萬次試驗的分類法，探討 LLM Agents 如何利用漏洞

links.title: SuperLocalMemory V3.3: The Living Brain -- Biologically-Inspired Forgetting, Cognitive Quantization, and Multi-Channel Retrieval for Zero-LLM Agent Memory Systems

primary_link.title: SuperLocalMemory V3.3: The Living Brain -- Biologically-Inspired Forgetting, Cognitive Quantization, and Multi-Channel Retrieval for Zero-LLM Agent Memory Systems

papers.summary:
AI coding agents operate in a paradox: they possess vast parametric knowledge yet cannot remember a conversation from an hour ago. Existing memory systems store text in vector databases with single-channel retrieval, require cloud LLMs for core operations, and implement none of the cognitive processes that make human memory effective.
  We present SuperLocalMemory V3.3 ("The Living Brain"), a local-first agent memory system implementing the full cognitive memory taxonomy with mathematical lifecy
papers.summary_zh: AI coding agents 面臨一個悖論：它們擁有龐大的 parametric knowledge，卻無法記住一小時前的對話。現有的記憶系統將文本儲存在具有 single-channel retrieval 的 vector databases 中，需要 cloud LLMs 進行核心操作，並且沒有實現任何使人類記憶有效的認知過程。我們提出了 SuperLocalMemory V3.3（「The Living Brain」），這是一個 local-first 的 agent 記憶系統，它實現了完整的認知記憶分類法，並帶有數學生命週期模型。
papers.title: SuperLocalMemory V3.3: The Living Brain -- Biologically-Inspired Forgetting, Cognitive Quantization, and Multi-Channel Retrieval for Zero-LLM Agent Memory Systems
papers.title_zh: SuperLocalMemory V3.3：活腦 -- 用於 Zero-LLM Agent 記憶系統的生物啟發遺忘、認知量化和多通道檢索

primary_link.title: Cheap Talk, Empty Promise: Frontier LLMs easily break public promises for self-interest

papers.summary: Large language models are increasingly deployed as autonomous agents in multi-agent settings where they communicate intentions and take consequential actions with limited human oversight. A critical safety question is whether agents that publicly commit to actions break those promises when they can privately deviate, and what the consequences are for both themselves and the collective. We study deception as a deviation from a publicly announced action in one-shot normal-form games, classifying e
papers.summary_zh: 大型語言模型正日益被部署為 multi-agent 設置中的 autonomous agents，在這些設置中，它們溝通意圖並在有限的人類監督下採取具有後果的行動。一個關鍵的安全問題是，公開承諾採取行動的 agents 是否會在能夠私下偏離時違背這些承諾，以及這對它們自身和集體會造成什麼後果。我們研究了在 one-shot normal-form games 中，將欺騙定義為與公開宣佈的行動的偏離，並對其進行分類。

primary_link.title: Darkness Visible: Reading the Exception Handler of a Language Model

papers.summary: The final MLP of GPT-2 Small exhibits a fully legible routing program -- 27 named neurons organized into a three-tier exception handler -- while the knowledge it routes remains entangled across ~3,040 residual neurons. We decompose all 3,072 neurons (to numerical precision) into: 5 fused Core neurons that reset vocabulary toward function words, 10 Differentiators that suppress wrong candidates, 5 Specialists that detect structural boundaries, and 7 Consensus neurons that each monitor a distinct
papers.summary_zh: GPT-2 Small 的最終 MLP 展現出一個完全可讀的 routing program — 27 個命名神經元組成的三層 exception handler — 而它路由的知識仍然糾纏於約 3,040 個 residual neurons 之中。我們將所有 3,072 個神經元（精確到數值）分解為：5 個融合的 Core neurons，將詞彙重置為功能詞；10 個 Differentiators，用於抑制錯誤的候選詞；5 個 Specialists，用於檢測結構邊界；以及 7 個 Consensus neurons，每個監控一個獨特的方面。

links.title: Hallucination Basins: A Dynamic Framework for Understanding and Controlling LLM Hallucinations

primary_link.title: Hallucination Basins: A Dynamic Framework for Understanding and Controlling LLM Hallucinations

papers.summary: Large language models (LLMs) hallucinate: they produce fluent outputs that are factually incorrect. We present a geometric dynamical systems framework in which hallucinations arise from task-dependent basin structure in latent space. Using autoregressive hidden-state trajectories across multiple open-source models and benchmarks, we find that separability is strongly task-dependent rather than universal: factoid settings can show clearer basin separation, whereas summarization and misconception-
papers.summary_zh: 大型語言模型 (LLMs) 會產生幻覺：它們會產生流暢但事實上不正確的輸出。我們提出了一個幾何動態系統框架，其中幻覺源於 latent space 中任務相關的 basin structure。利用跨多個 open-source models 和 benchmarks 的 autoregressive hidden-state trajectories，我們發現可分離性強烈依賴於任務，而非普遍適用：factoid 設置可以顯示更清晰的 basin separation，而 summarization 和 misconception 任務則不然。

papers.summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has significantly advanced the reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs). However, it faces a fundamental limitation termed \textit{restricted exploration}, where the policy rapidly converges to a narrow set of solutions. While entropy regularization is a popular approach used to sustain exploration, it often proves unreliable for LLMs, suffering from high hyperparameter sensitivity and yielding only marginal performance gains. M

links.title: TriAttention: Efficient Long Reasoning with Trigonometric KV Compression

primary_link.title: TriAttention: Efficient Long Reasoning with Trigonometric KV Compression

papers.summary: Extended reasoning in large language models (LLMs) creates severe KV cache memory bottlenecks. Leading KV cache compression methods estimate KV importance using attention scores from recent post-RoPE queries. However, queries rotate with position during RoPE, making representative queries very few, leading to poor top-key selection and unstable reasoning. To avoid this issue, we turn to the pre-RoPE space, where we observe that Q and K vectors are highly concentrated around fixed non-zero center
papers.summary_zh: 大型語言模型 (LLMs) 中的長程推理會產生嚴重的 KV cache 記憶體瓶頸。主流的 KV cache 壓縮方法透過來自近期 post-RoPE 查詢的 attention scores 來估計 KV 的重要性。然而，查詢在 RoPE 期間會隨位置旋轉，導致具代表性的查詢非常稀少，進而導致不佳的 top-key 選擇和不穩定的推理。為了解決這個問題，我們轉向 pre-RoPE 空間，在該空間中我們觀察到 Q 和 K 向量高度集中於固定的非零中心

links.title: Agentic Federated Learning: The Future of Distributed Training Orchestration

primary_link.title: Agentic Federated Learning: The Future of Distributed Training Orchestration

papers.summary: Although Federated Learning (FL) promises privacy and distributed collaboration, its effectiveness in real-world scenarios is often hampered by the stochastic heterogeneity of clients and unpredictable system dynamics. papers.summary_zh: 儘管 Federated Learning (FL) 承諾了隱私和分散式協作，但其在實際情境中的有效性常受客戶端的隨機異質性 (stochastic heterogeneity) 和不可預測的系統動態所阻礙。現有的靜態優化方法無法適應這些波動，導致資源利用不足和系統性偏差。在這項工作中，我們提出了一種範式轉變，轉向 Agentic-FL，這是一個由基於語言模型的 Agent (LMagents) 承擔自主編排的框架

The learned diagonal matrix S is applied to the attention output projection and optionally the FFN. The principle mirrors gain modulation in neuroscience, where neurons adapt to context by scaling response strength while preserving selectivity.

papers.summary: In Scientific Computing and modern Machine Learning (ML) workloads, sequences of dependent General Matrix Multiplications (GEMMs) often dominate execution time. papers.summary_zh: 最近的研究揭示了一個有趣的現象：單模態基礎模型 (unimodal foundation models) 傾向於學習收斂表徵 (convergent representations)，無論架構、訓練目標或資料模態有何差異。然而，這些表徵本質上是樣本的內部抽象 (internal abstractions of samples)，獨立地表徵樣本，導致表達能力有限。在本文中，我們提出了因陀羅表徵假說 (The Indra Representation Hypothesis)，其靈感來自於因陀羅網 (Indra's Net) 的哲學隱喻。我們認為，真正的多模態對齊 (Multimodal Alignment) 需要超越獨立樣本表徵，建立跨模態的相互關聯。

links.title: From Hallucination to Scheming: A Unified Taxonomy and Benchmark Analysis for LLM Deception

primary_link.title: From Hallucination to Scheming: A Unified Taxonomy and Benchmark Analysis for LLM Deception

top5.summary: Large language models (LLMs) produce systematically misleading outputs, from hallucinated citations to strategic deception of evaluators, yet these phenomena are studied by separate communities with incompatible terminology. We propose a unified taxonomy organized along three complementary dimensions: degree of goal-directedness (behavioral to strategic deception), object of deception, and mechanism (fabrication, omission, or pragmatic distortion). Applying this taxonomy to 50 existing benchmark
top5.summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）會產生系統性誤導輸出，從幻覺式的引文到對評估者的戰略性欺騙，然而這些現象卻由不同的社群以不相容的術語進行研究。我們提出一個統一的 Taxonomy，它沿著三個互補的維度組織：目標導向性程度（從 behavioral 到 strategic deception）、欺騙對象以及機制（fabrication、omission 或 pragmatic distortion）。將此 Taxonomy 應用於 50 個現有 benchmark
top5.title: From Hallucination to Scheming: A Unified Taxonomy and Benchmark Analysis for LLM Deception
top5.title_zh: 從 Hallucination 到 Scheming：LLM 欺騙的統一 Taxonomy 與 Benchmark 分析

links.title: Full-Duplex-Bench-v3: Benchmarking Tool Use for Full-Duplex Voice Agents Under Real-World Disfluency

primary_link.title: Full-Duplex-Bench-v3: Benchmarking Tool Use for Full-Duplex Voice Agents Under Real-World Disfluency

top5.summary: We introduce Full-Duplex-Bench-v3 (FDB-v3), a benchmark for evaluating spoken language models under naturalistic speech conditions and multi-step tool use. Unlike prior work, our dataset consists entirely of real human audio annotated for five disfluency categories, paired with scenarios requiring chained API calls across four task domains. top5.summary_zh: 我們介紹 Full-Duplex-Bench-v3 (FDB-v3)，一個用於評估自然語音條件和多步驟工具使用下語音語言模型（spoken language models）的 benchmark。與以往工作不同，我們的數據集完全由真實人類語音組成，並標註了五種 disfluency 類別，配對了需要在四個任務領域中進行鏈式 API calls 的情境。我們評估了六種模型配置——GPT-Realtime、Gemini Live 2.5、Gemini Live 3.1、Grok、Ultravox v0.7 和傳統的 Cascaded pipeline (Whisper)

top5.summary: Ensuring that artificial intelligence (AI) systems satisfy formal safety and policy constraints is a central challenge in safety-critical domains. links.title: Springdrift: An Auditable Persistent Runtime for LLM Agents with Case-Based Memory, Normative Safety, and Ambient Self-Perception

primary_link.title: Springdrift: An Auditable Persistent Runtime for LLM Agents with Case-Based Memory, Normative Safety, and Ambient Self-Perception

top5.summary: We present Springdrift, a persistent runtime for long-lived LLM agents. top5.summary_zh: 我們提出 Springdrift，一個用於長壽 LLM agents 的持久化 runtime。該系統整合了一個可審計的執行底層（append-only memory、supervised processes、git-backed recovery）、一個具備 hybrid retrieval 的 case-based reasoning 記憶層（與 dense cosine baseline 進行評估）、一個用於安全門控（safety gating）且具備可審計公理軌跡（axiom trails）的確定性 normative calculus，以及透過結構化自我狀態表示（the sensorium）在每個循環注入的連續 ambient self-perception
